title: sida aurea
intro: Sida aurea, also known as golden mallow or yellow mallow, is a plant species within the Malvaceae family, native to Australia and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Sida aurea include the treatment of various conditions such as fever, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and emollient properties. Sida aurea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
